name: Christmas Gingerbread Bowl and Cookies Pt. 1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the softened butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add granulated sugar, molasses, dark corn syrup, and vanilla extract to the butter mixture. Mix well.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated before adding the next.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ground cloves, ginger, orange extract, allspice, and black pepper.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Use cookie cutters to shape the dough into desired shapes and place them on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for approximately 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden around the edges.
8. Remove from the oven and allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for about 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
